_meta.description: Machine-readable index of every module in the FMP Sync (Tables) Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase — it tells you exactly where to look for any given concern.
_meta.usage: Find the module whose 'purpose' matches your task, then read only that file and its 'depends_on' entries.

architecture.overview: FMP Sync (app_title: Tables) synchronises FileMaker Server base tables to Frappe custom doctypes via the OData v4 API. It mirrors FM table schemas from the FileMaker Connection.fm_schema cache (OData system tables) as Frappe doctypes, then syncs data via OData GET requests. Reverse sync (Frappe → FM) is stubbed for future OData POST/PATCH implementation.
architecture.data_flow: FileMaker OData v4 → schema_mirror.py (fm_schema cache → create/update Frappe doctype) → data_sync.py (GET records with $filter/$select → upsert Frappe records) | Frappe doc events → live_sync.py (stub) / reverse_sync.py (stub)
key_patterns: FM Tables doctype is the central config record per synced table (column mapping, matching keys, field overrides, skipped/stored-calc fields)
FileMaker Connection is a Single DocType storing OData credentials (host, port, database, Basic Auth, SSL)
schema_mirror.py builds FM table schema from FileMaker Connection.fm_schema cache (OData system tables) and creates/updates Frappe custom doctype
data_sync.py does incremental sync using OData $filter on timestamp fields, with paginated GET via @odata.nextLink
live_sync.py and reverse_sync.py are no-op stubs — will use OData POST/PATCH when reverse sync is needed
classify_field() skips unstored calcs (Computed=true), containers (Edm.Binary/Stream), and repeating fields (MaxRepetitions>1)
API Connector stores external API credentials (base_url, auth_pattern, credential_config JSON)

fmp_sync/hooks.py.purpose: App config: metadata, CSS/JS includes, apps screen registration (title: Tables, route: /app/tables), after_install hook

fmp_sync/api.py.purpose: Whitelisted page-level endpoints: toggle auto-sync, get table links grid, apply table link changes, export doctype to Excel

fmp_sync/install.py.purpose: App install/upgrade helpers: ensure_fmp_sync_settings_row() creates the FMP Sync Settings singleton on first install; after_install() is called by Frappe post bench install-app.

fmp_sync/overrides.py.purpose: Frappe lifecycle override hooks: injects FMP Sync version label into Tables workspace

fmp_sync/utils/schema_mirror.py.purpose: FileMaker OData schema from FileMaker Connection.fm_schema cache, classify fields (include/skip), map EDM types to Frappe types, create or update Frappe custom doctype

fmp_sync/utils/data_sync.py.purpose: FM-to-Frappe incremental data sync via OData: fetch changed records using $filter on timestamp fields, paginate with @odata.nextLink, upsert Frappe records, publish progress events

fmp_sync/utils/live_sync.py.purpose: STUB — Real-time Frappe-to-FM sync triggered by doc events. Hook handler is kept functional (cache, enqueue) but push_record_to_fm is a no-op. Will use OData PATCH/POST when implemented.

fmp_sync/utils/reverse_sync.py.purpose: STUB — Full Frappe-to-FM bulk sync. assign_temp_name hook is kept functional (allocates negative integer temp names via FMP Sync Settings singleton). Core sync functions (sync_frappe_to_fm, insert/update) are no-op stubs. Will use OData POST/PATCH when implemented.

fmp_sync/utils/workspace_utils.py.purpose: Frappe Workspace creation/management utilities for FMP Sync

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/fm_tables/.purpose: Central config per synced FileMaker table: table name, Frappe doctype name, column mapping, matching keys, timestamp fields, auto-sync flag, skipped/stored-calc fields metadata

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/filemaker_conn.purpose: FileMaker OData v4 connection config (Single DocType): host, port, database, username, password, SSL settings. Provides get_odata_session(), test_connection(), discover_tables().

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/api_connector/.purpose: External API connector config: base_url, auth_pattern, credential_config (JSON).

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/api_connector_.purpose: Individual API endpoint definition linked to an API Connector

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/sync_manager/.purpose: Global sync manager — enable/disable syncing, set frequency, view last run status

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/fmp_sync_setti.purpose: Internal Single DocType: stores temp_name_counter (Int) used by reverse_sync._next_temp_name() to allocate negative temporary Frappe document names before a FileMaker primary key is known.

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/doctype/sync_log/.purpose: Audit log of each sync run: table, records synced/created/updated/deleted, duration, errors

fmp_sync/patches/ensure_fmp_sync_setting.purpose: post_model_sync patch: calls install.ensure_fmp_sync_settings_row() so existing sites get the FMP Sync Settings singleton row after bench migrate.

fmp_sync/patches/create_table_links_page.purpose: post_model_sync patch: creates the Table Links Frappe Page record if it does not already exist.

fmp_sync/patches/add_listen_for_changes_.purpose: pre_model_sync patch: adds the listen_for_changes field to FM Tables DocType if missing (schema migration).

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/page/fmp_sync/.purpose: Main FMP Sync dashboard page — table list, sync triggers, status display

fmp_sync/fmp_sync/page/table_links/.purpose: Table Links page — visual grid for managing cross-table relationships (which FM tables are linked to which Frappe doctypes)

fmp_sync/public/js/list_auto_size.js.purpose: Global JS — auto-sizes list view columns for better readability
